o our primary server room in order to complete tests of and apply load to our new UPS backup system. **Most services including file storage will be offline from 11PM Tues. 7/31 to 9AM Wed. 8/1**. * **Network infrastructure** including wired and wirel

7/31**. * **Storage services**, including home and project file storage, will be shut down at **12 AM Wed. 8/1**. * All services are scheduled to be **restored by 9AM Wed. 8/1**, but may be online earlier if maintenance is completed ahead of schedul

b sites will be offline tonight for maintenance. Machines which access the file servers may need to be rebooted after 9AM to clear any issues. UPDATE [2018-08-01 08:58:24 | Derek Calderon] This maintenance has been completed and all services have bee

nance has been completed and all services have been restored. If you notice any problems, please try rebooting the affected machines, and then email help@eecs.berkeley.edu if the issue continues after rebooting. Our new UPS (battery backup) system is
